code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut out = ""
mut j = 0
mut first = true
while j < total
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 2
end
println(out)
